title: Director of Public Prosecutions Vs. Arthur Ferguson
text:
1
1 COMMONWEALTH OF THE BAHAMAS
2 IN THE COURT OF APPEAL
3 SCCrApp & CAIS No. 183 of 2025
4
5 Director of Public Prosecutions
6 Appellant
7 vs
8
9 Arthur Ferguson
10 Respondent
11
12 (Bail Appeal)
13
14
15 Before: The Hon Mr Justice Evans, President
The Hon Mr Justice Turner, JA
16 The Hon Mr Justice Hilton, JA
17
18
Ms Darnell Dorsette, Counsel for Appellant
19 Ms Tamika Roberts, Counsel for Respondent
20
21
22 13 April 2026
23
24
25

2
1 The oral judgment of the court was delivered by
2 Evans, P:
3 Having given consideration to this matter, we have
4 determined that the appeal by the Director of Public
5 Prosecutions should be dismissed.
6 As a result, the terms of bail granted by the
7 learned trial judge in the Supreme Court will take effect, and
8 all of the arrangements for signing should be conducted at the
9 Supreme Court.
10 The court will provide its reasons for doing so at a
11 later date, as soon as we are able.
12
13
14
15
16 Dated this 13th day of April, 2026
17
18 _________________________
19 EVANS, P

summary: Having given consideration to this matter, we have determined that the appeal by the Director of Public Prosecutions should be dismissed.
